title: The Move
description: THE MOVE was founded in 2023 from the strategic synergy of two partners: Pyae Thiri, an interior design expert, and Kaung Khant, a registered architect (RA) with the Myanmar Architect Council. What began as a dedicated two-person practice has grown under Pyae Thiri’s leadership into a Mandalay-based studio of architects and interior designers—scaling impact while keeping the boutique precision clients value.

We specialise in strategic space planning and conceptual innovation, bridging creative storytelling with technical precision. Our portfolio spans residential sanctuaries, commercial landmarks, and hospitality experiences across Mandalay, Yangon, Pyin Oo Lwin, and beyond—from warm minimal apartments to classical homes designed as architecture of care, retail environments, cafes, and hotels.

Every project in our Showcase Book 2023–2025 reflects deliberate material palettes, concealed and ambient light, and spaces shaped around how people actually live, work, and gather. No two commissions are alike; each is a distinct chapter in one practice connecting tradition, modernity, and the emotion of space.

title: Pyae Thiri
description: Pyae Thiri leads THE MOVE’s creative vision with a foundation in professional interior design and a commitment to high-end, minimalist realities that still feel warm and human. She guides projects from first spatial challenge through final furniture and light—ensuring each environment is as functional as it is atmospheric.

Her work emphasises meticulous space planning, natural materials, and the final layer of furniture and art that makes a space feel inhabited rather than staged. Clients describe the studio’s approach as calm, precise, and deeply attentive to daily life.

As founder, she has built a team that can deliver both interior design and architecture across Myanmar, while preserving the intimate collaboration that defined the firm’s earliest residential and commercial commissions.
